title: araucariaceae
intro: The taxonomical rank of Araucariaceae is a family of coniferous plants. It is a botanical family that comprises a group of related species known as the dawn redwoods, kauri, and Norfolk pines, among others. The Araucariaceae family is characterized by its unique, needle-like leaves and cone-bearing reproductive structures. This family includes some of the most ancient and iconic conifer species, with many species having evolved over millions of years.
